summary: The audit for https://moveroo.com.au/terms-and-conditions-transport scored 96/100. Below is the list of issues requiring attention.

issues.remediation: Optimize your description length. Descriptions around 150-160 characters maximize screen real estate in search results without truncation.
Add article:modified_time meta tag or include dateModified in your Schema.org markup.
Add author bylines with links to author bio pages. Use schema.org/Person markup for best results.

issues.issue_detected: OG image found but dimensions could not be verified
issues.remediation: Ensure og:image is accessible and at least 1200x630.
Audit your third-party scripts. Remove unused ones and defer others.
If this page represents a product or local business, add `aggregateRating` schema to be eligible for star snippets.
Try parsing your content into Q&A format using H2 and H3 tags.
